# NIP-73 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
NIP-73: External Content IDs. `i` tags reference external IDs, `k` tags represent ID kinds. Supported IDs: 
- URLs (`i`: normalized URL, `k`: "web")
- Books (`i`: "isbn:<id>", `k`: "isbn")
- Geohashes (`i`: "geo:<geohash>", `k`: "geo")
- Countries (`i`: "iso3166:<code>", `k`: "iso3166")
- Movies (`i`: "isan:<id>", `k`: "isan")
- Papers (`i`: "doi:<id>", `k`: "doi")
- Hashtags (`i`: "#<topic>", `k`: "#")
- Podcasts (`i`: "podcast:<type>:<guid>", `k`: "podcast:<type>:guid")
- Bl

---
